brief_notes: Coherent narrative covering the neurofeedback paradigm but tables are severely impoverished. SWR rate table shows only direction and significance without actual rates. Speed table provides only p-value ranges without actual velocity values. Behavioral table shows only p-value ranges. Replay content analysis lacks any numerical event rates, proportions, or decoding accuracy values. The protocol table is adequate. Discussion is thoughtful but the paper cannot be evaluated as rigorous without quantitative results.
